```op
MKDIR: .git
```

```sr
FILE: .gitignore
SEARCH:
<<<
>>>
REPLACE:
<<<
# Dependencies
node_modules/

# Environment variables
.env
.env.local
.env.*.local

# Logs
*.log
npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*

# Database files (PostgreSQL)
*.db
*.sqlite
*.sqlite3
postgres-data/

# IDE and editor
.vscode/
.idea/
*.swp
*.swo
*~

# OS generated files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Build outputs
dist/
build/

# Coverage reports
coverage/
.nyc_output/

# Temporary files
tmp/
temp/
*.tmp
<<<
```
